task: Add UploadTransport port trait and S3UploadTransport adapter to the Tauri backend crate with non-network signing tests.
notes: The workspace backend crate is frontend/web/src-tauri with package name app.
S3UploadTransport uses aws-sdk-s3 to presign PUT upload requests and uses delete_object for abort.
A local [patch.crates-io] override vendors aws-runtime to apply a one-line Rust 1.95 compatibility fix for its event-stream deferred signer send call.
